about.card1Subtitle: Built by a Challenger Double Up player
about.card1Body: Dualytics is built from firsthand Double Up experience, not generic ladder assumptions. The goal is to surface the partner synergies, augment handoffs, comp pairings, and late-game decisions that actually matter in duo queue.
about.card2Subtitle: Live data, focused analysis, and fast iteration
about.card2Body: Dualytics is a full-stack analytics project built to make Double Up easier to study. It combines Riot match data, MongoDB storage, custom filtering, and a clean frontend so players can explore comps, teammate patterns, and partner synergy without digging through raw match history.
